overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through Night City's neon-lit districts at night. The vehicle accelerates on elevated highways, passes massive skyscrapers with vertical holographic advertisements, and navigates through dense urban canyons before stopping in a commercial area.

events.description: exiting enclosed garage structure onto open elevated highway
rapid acceleration from stationary to high speed

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the elevated highway leaving the garage behind

entered.detail: large dark building with illuminated exit
distant illuminated skyscrapers against hazy night sky

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits a dark garage structure onto an elevated highway at night. The camera accelerates rapidly along the multi-lane road, with the distant city skyline visible through the hazy atmosphere.

events.description: sharp braking and deceleration for left turn around skyscrapers
passing from open highway into urban canyon between massive towers

agents.ego_description: braking and navigating a left turn around massive skyscraper complex with vertical neon advertisements

entered.detail: tall towers with vertical neon advertisements and holographic displays
metal safety barrier along elevated road edge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle brakes sharply and navigates a left turn around a massive skyscraper complex adorned with vertical neon billboards. The scene transitions from open highway to an urban canyon as the camera passes between towering glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street with heavy advertising

events.description: accelerating through commercial district after completing the turn
entering dense billboard district with close building facades

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow city streets lined with neon billboards and commercial buildings

entered.detail: buildings covered with large horizontal digital advertisements
bright illuminated signs for various corporations

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense commercial district with buildings covered in large digital billboards and neon signage. The vehicle accelerates along the elevated road, passing close to illuminated building facades in the narrow urban canyon.

events.description: gradual deceleration as vehicle approaches destination
vehicle comes to complete stop in front of storefronts

agents.ego_description: slowing to a stop in front of commercial storefronts with large digital displays

entered.detail: ground-level shop windows with bright neon lighting
massive digital billboards showing product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle gradually slows to a stop in a dense commercial area, with storefront displays and large advertisement screens visible at close range. The camera settles in front of illuminated shop facades surrounded by neon signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a dark, enclosed exit into the neon-drenched density of a futuristic urban canyon. It begins as the vehicle accelerates out of a dark garage onto an elevated highway, speeding toward a hazy city skyline under the night sky. As the vehicle brakes sharply to navigate a left turn, the open road gives way to a massive skyscraper complex adorned with vertical neon billboards. The scene then shifts into a dense commercial district, where the camera glides through a narrow corridor of towering glass buildings and glowing digital facades. Finally, the vehicle gradually slows to a stop, settling amidst the close-range glare of illuminated storefronts and vibrant advertisement screens.
